NVY-2257.notes: Unauthorized data siphon confirmed; suspects are mobilizing.

ORE-4817.notes: Receiving support from ORE-7747; structural integrity holding.

active_events: The science vessel SCI-5408 continues its sampling operation in outer scan range.
The frigate FRG-8707 actively engages ESC-one-three-five-seven in sector one.
current_arc: NVY-2257 confirms data siphon. Combat flares up as FRG-8707 engages ESC-1357.
recent_transmissions: TOWER: Unidentified vessel in sector one, this is Tower. I see you're closing in on ESC-one-three-five-seven. Please confirm your callsign, faction, and intentions. If you do not respond, we will assume hostile intent and take appropriate action.
CAPT: NVY-two-two-five-seven, this is Captain NVY-two-two-five-seven. Any updates on your investigation progress in sector four? Over.
